description: Implement a doubleLeftClick (and potentially doubleRightClick) action. On button press, emit two rapid click-down/click-up sequences with a short delay between them (system double-click interval). This needs CGEvent pairs with proper timing — either via a short dispatch_after or by tracking state across poll frames.

comments.text: Implemented as part of jr-veu.1 — DoubleLeftClick and DoubleRightClick variants in Action enum, with MouseEmitter::double_click() using CGEvent click count fields.

title: Double-click action
